data.title: Strip dead comingSoon plumbing from OctahedronHero

data.body:
PASS. Reviewed cold against plan task_01KTJ4B8RFGPNN1Q8J8EBVP647.md.

Diff: 1 file (src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx), +2/-14, matches planner prediction exactly.

Removals verified (5):
1. NavNode interface: comingSoon?: boolean field gone (line 112 in old).
2. Tap handler: FRAC-36 guard + comment block removed; collapses to onNavigate(node.route).
3. Tooltip cursor: ternary -> literal 'pointer'.
4. Tooltip onClick: FRAC-36 guard + comment removed; collapses to stopPropagation + onNavigate.
5. Tooltip label: FRAC-37 comment + ternary removed; renders {node.label} directly.

Grep checks:
- grep -n 'comingSoon' src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx -> 0 hits.
- grep -rn 'comingSoon' src/ -> 0 hits.
- 'Coming Soon' string only remains in historical comments (lines 100, 124) explaining the FRAC-47 swap — those are documentation and intentionally preserved.

Structure:
- FRAC-47 swap-explanation block comment at lines 95-105 intact (still accurate).
- NavNode is file-local (not exported); grep -rn 'NavNode' src/ confirms only internal refs in OctahedronHero.tsx.
- No other files touched (no DESIGN.md, no plans, no Navbar, no houses.ts).

Checks:
- pnpm tsc --noEmit: clean (no output).
- pnpm build: succeeds, 2778 modules transformed in 3.62s.
- pnpm test: 143 passed / 4 failed = baseline 143/4 maintained. The 4 failures (footer italic span, navbar mobile abbreviation, neighborhood min-h-screen, +1) are pre-existing and unrelated to this dead-code removal.

Behavior preservation: each removed branch was the never-taken path because no OUTER_NAV_NODES entry sets comingSoon. Collapsing to the always-taken path is a pure no-op. PRD/mobile-first impact: nil (no behavior change, no UI change at 375px).

No concerns. Clean cleanup.
